title: Several monday board automations not working
excerpt: I created a new board and have been creating automations. The first automation was working fine ( had a few delays today) for the most part. I created more and they are not working at all. Has anyone had this issue?

posts.author: OctaviaHightower (Octavia Hightower)
posts.cookedHtml: I created a new board and have been creating automations. The first automation was working fine ( had a few delays today) for the most part. I created more and they are not working at all. Has anyone had this issue?

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @OctaviaHightower ,

Welcome to the monday community!

If you could share with us some of these automations I would be glad to look into them and try to figure out why they are not working.

If you are certain that they are correctly configured ( currently activated, no deleted columns etc), I would suggest contacting monday support.

Sometimes there are minor delays in automations activating, but they should work after a while, so I would also suggest trying them again.

Hope this helps!
-Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
